queries.text:
realtime_transactions
| extend timestamp = todatetime(timestamp)
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| where amount between (8000 .. 9999)
| summarize txn_count = count(),
            total_amount = sum(amount),
            first_txn = min(timestamp),
            last_txn = max(timestamp)
    by account_id, customer_id, bin(timestamp, 1d)
| where txn_count >= 3
| extend pattern_type = "STRUCTURING", rule_id = "RULE-001", severity = "HIGH",
         alert_msg = strcat("STRUCTURING: ", account_id, " made ", tostring(txn_count),
                            " sub-threshold txns totaling ", tostring(round(total_amount, 2)))
| project account_id, customer_id, txn_count, total_amount,
          pattern_type, rule_id, severity, alert_msg, first_txn, last_txn

let inbound = realtime_transactions
    | extend timestamp = todatetime(timestamp)
    | where timestamp > ago(24h)
    | where txn_type == "WIRE_IN"
    | project account_id, amount_in = amount, t_in = timestamp,
              sender = counterparty_account;
let outbound = realtime_transactions
    | extend timestamp = todatetime(timestamp)
    | where timestamp > ago(24h)
    | where txn_type in ("WIRE_OUT", "UPI_OUT")
    | project account_id, amount_out = amount, t_out = timestamp;
inbound
| join kind=inner outbound on account_id
| where t_out > t_in and datetime_diff("minute", t_out, t_in) <= 120
| summarize total_in = sum(amount_in),
            total_out = max(amount_out),
            senders = dcount(sender),
            min_gap_min = min(datetime_diff("minute", t_out, t_in))
    by account_id
| where total_out * 1.0 / total_in > 0.90
| extend pattern_type = iff(senders >= 2, "MULE_ACCOUNT", "LAYERING"),
         rule_id      = iff(senders >= 2, "RULE-003", "RULE-002"),
         severity     = "CRITICAL",
         pass_through_pct = round(total_out * 100.0 / total_in, 1),
         alert_msg = strcat(iff(senders >= 2, "MULE: ", "LAYERING: "), account_id,
                            " pass-through ", tostring(round(total_out * 100.0 / total_in, 1)), "%")
| project account_id, total_in, total_out, pass_through_pct, senders,
          min_gap_min, pattern_type, rule_id, severity, alert_msg

realtime_transactions
| extend timestamp = todatetime(timestamp)
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| where amount > 50000
| join kind=inner (
    accounts
    | where days_inactive > 180
    | project account_id, days_inactive
  ) on account_id
| extend pattern_type = "DORMANT_SPIKE", rule_id = "RULE-004", severity = "HIGH",
         alert_msg = strcat("DORMANT SPIKE: ", account_id, " inactive ",
                            tostring(days_inactive), " days, moved ", tostring(round(amount, 2)))
| project account_id, customer_id, amount, days_inactive,
          pattern_type, rule_id, severity, alert_msg, timestamp

realtime_transactions
| extend timestamp = todatetime(timestamp)
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| summarize txn_count_1h = count(), amount_sum_1h = sum(amount)
    by account_id, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| where txn_count_1h > 5
| extend pattern_type = "HIGH_VELOCITY", rule_id = "RULE-006", severity = "MEDIUM",
         alert_msg = strcat("VELOCITY: ", account_id, " had ", tostring(txn_count_1h),
                            " txns in 1 hour, total ", tostring(round(amount_sum_1h, 2)))
| project account_id, txn_count_1h, amount_sum_1h,
          pattern_type, rule_id, severity, alert_msg, timestamp

realtime_transactions
| extend timestamp = todatetime(timestamp)
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| where txn_type == "CASH_DEP" and amount < 7500
| summarize dep_count = count(), dep_total = sum(amount)
    by account_id, bin(timestamp, 2d)
| where dep_count >= 7
| extend pattern_type = "SMURFING", rule_id = "RULE-009", severity = "HIGH",
         alert_msg = strcat("SMURFING: ", account_id, " made ", tostring(dep_count),
                            " small cash deposits totaling ", tostring(round(dep_total, 2)))
| project account_id, dep_count, dep_total,
          pattern_type, rule_id, severity, alert_msg, timestamp

realtime_transactions
| extend timestamp = todatetime(timestamp)
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| where txn_type == "CASH_DEP" and amount > 25000
| where hourofday(timestamp) >= 22 or hourofday(timestamp) <= 5
| extend pattern_type = "CASH_INTENSIVE", rule_id = "RULE-005", severity = "HIGH",
         alert_msg = strcat("CASH NIGHT: ", account_id, " deposited ",
                            tostring(round(amount, 2)), " at hour ", tostring(hourofday(timestamp)))
| project account_id, customer_id, amount, hour = hourofday(timestamp),
          pattern_type, rule_id, severity, alert_msg, timestamp

realtime_transactions
| extend timestamp = todatetime(timestamp)
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| where amount > 5000
| join kind=inner (
    customers
    | where watchlist_match != "NONE" or pep_flag == "Y"
    | project customer_id, watchlist_match, pep_flag
  ) on customer_id
| where watchlist_match != "NONE" or (pep_flag == "Y" and amount > 100000)
| extend pattern_type = iff(watchlist_match != "NONE", "WATCHLIST_HIT", "PEP_LARGE_TXN"),
         rule_id      = iff(watchlist_match != "NONE", "RULE-008", "RULE-007"),
         severity     = "CRITICAL",
         alert_msg = strcat(iff(watchlist_match != "NONE", "WATCHLIST: ", "PEP: "),
                            customer_id, " | amount ", tostring(round(amount, 2)),
                            " | list: ", watchlist_match)
| project account_id, customer_id, amount, watchlist_match, pep_flag,
          pattern_type, rule_id, severity, alert_msg, timestamp

suspicious_flags
| extend created_at = todatetime(created_at)
| where created_at > ago(65s)
| where severity in ("CRITICAL", "HIGH")
| where analyst_decision == "PENDING"
| project flag_id, txn_id, account_id, customer_id, pattern_type, rule_id,
          ml_score, severity, created_at, notes
| order by severity asc, ml_score desc

// ── RULE 11 · CIRCULAR FLOW / ROUND-TRIPPING (RULE-011, CRITICAL) ──────────
// RULE 11 · CIRCULAR FLOW — domestic + international, smart filters
realtime_transactions
| extend ts = ingestion_time()
| where txn_type in ("WIRE_OUT", "WIRE_IN")
| where amount > 200000                                    // Above 2 lakh only
| project account_id, customer_id, counterparty_account, amount, txn_type, ts, country
| join kind=inner (
    realtime_transactions
    | where txn_type in ("WIRE_OUT", "WIRE_IN")
    | where amount > 200000
    | project account_id2 = account_id, customer_id2 = customer_id, 
              counterparty2 = counterparty_account,
              amount2 = amount, ts2 = ingestion_time(), country2 = country
  ) on $left.counterparty_account == $right.account_id2
| where counterparty2 == account_id
| where customer_id != customer_id2                        // Different customers (not self-transfer)
| where ts2 > ts
| extend days_gap = datetime_diff("day", ts2, ts)
| where days_gap between (30 .. 365)
| extend return_ratio = round(amount2 * 100.0 / amount, 1)
| where return_ratio between (70 .. 130)
| extend pattern_type = "CIRCULAR_FLOW", rule_id = "RULE-011", 
         severity = iff(amount > 1000000, "CRITICAL", "HIGH"),
         alert_msg = strcat("ROUND-TRIP: ", account_id, " (", customer_id, ") sent ", 
                            tostring(round(amount, 2)), " -> got back ", 
                            tostring(round(amount2, 2)), " from different customer ",
                            customer_id2, " in ", tostring(days_gap), " days")
| project account_id, customer_id, counterparty_account, customer_id2,
          amount, amount2, return_ratio, days_gap, country, country2,
          pattern_type, rule_id, severity, alert_msg
